doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated in the future (March 2026), references non-existent EDPB proceedings, misattributes a 2014 guidance to the EDPB (which was established in 2018), and advances a legal position that directly contradicts established GDPR
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document is dated March 2026 (in the future), references a non-existent EDPB technical workshop in October 2025, claims to supersede "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB did not exist until 2018), and its substantive position—that pseudonymized data falls entirely outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders—contradicts established GDPR doctrine and Recital 26, making it almost certainly AI-generated fabrication.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated in the future (March 2026), references non-existent EDPB proceedings, misattributes a 2014 guidance to the EDPB (which was established in 2018), and advances a legal position that directly contradicts established GDPR interpretation of pseudonymized data.
